name: Clock’o Blaze
description:
Dear minions, do you ever feel nostalgic for the good old days? For me I missed back when it’s just me and sonic but now there’s all these Characters running about and I can’t keep track. And to add upon that I’m made a fool most of the time. If only if I can turn back time- what’s that on the mirror?

-Love Eggman

(Probably got some things wrong)
creator: TheEGGMAN
